confidence.label: moderate
confidence.rationale: Maximum symbolic-order-strength score is supported by the Declaration of Rights' absolute vesting of sovereignty in the Nation and Robespierre's sacralization of the revolutionary order. Confidence capped at moderate; applies primarily to the Terror phase (1793–1794).

reviewNote: Score value 5/5 defensible: sacred-enemy-escalation mechanism (Committee of Public Safety, Law of Suspects, Festival of the Supreme Being) supports maximum symbolic-order-strength during the Terror. Confidence 0.63 reflects chain-requires-expansion and periodization ambiguity (which revolutionary phase?). Hold at score-review; specify the 1793-94 Terror period as the scored period before human-reviewed.
